历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5054 → 7135 → 9752 → 14586 → 11873, showing a continuous backward trend overall, reaching a peak of 14586 in 2024 before slightly recovering to 11873 in 2025, with significant fluctuations in the last two years. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 4 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 3 students in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 2 students, a 33.3% reduction compared to 2025, further intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 81st in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative impacts; Douyin popularity ranks 49th overall (relatively hot); no record of admission interruptions; Foreign Language and Literature is A+, related to the cross-disciplinary direction of the Physics Category enrollment major Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data), which has some appeal to cross-disciplinary candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science/Big Data related majors are socially popular and recommended; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 347,000, an increase of about 8.4% from 320,000 in 2025, with competition continuing to intensify.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 33.3% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the continued increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition for 2026 applications will intensify, and the ranking is expected to move forward (decrease in number); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9448, with a range of 8948–9948.
